task_completion.description: Navigate to the System Settings page in SuiteCRM
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SuiteCRM admin interface is visible in a web browser, specifically showing the 'System Settings' page.

task_completion.description: Set the System Name to Meridian Wholesale CRM
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'System Name' text input field contains exactly 'Meridian Wholesale CRM'.

task_completion.description: Upload the company logo from the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file input field for the logo shows 'meridian_logo.png' selected, or a file picker dialog is visible selecting the file from /home/ga/Documents/.

task_completion.description: Set Listview items per page to 50
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Listview items per page' dropdown or input field is set to '50'.
The checkbox for 'Prevent user customizable layouts' (or similar wording for locking the homepage) is checked.
The 'Save' button is clicked, and subsequent screens show the new settings applied (e.g., the new logo or system name is visible in the top navigation bar, or a success message is displayed).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SuiteCRM web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser (like Firefox or Chrome) is open and displaying the SuiteCRM application, rather than terminal commands or database clients being used to alter settings.

integrity.description: The agent uploaded the actual file from the filesystem
integrity.visual_evidence: A system file picker dialog or browser upload mechanism was used to select the file from /home/ga/Documents/, rather than inspecting/editing the HTML DOM to fake the upload.

integrity.description: The agent did not spoof the answers in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into the actual SuiteCRM web forms, not written into a text editor or a locally created HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected System Name is exactly 'Meridian Wholesale CRM'. The Listview items per page must be set to 50. The 'Prevent user customizable layouts' setting must be enabled (checked). The logo must be uploaded from the exact path '/home/ga/Documents/meridian_logo.png'.
